name: Fried Chicken a L'italienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the tomato batter by combining equal parts butter and oil in a bowl or on a plate.
2. Coat each chicken piece thoroughly with the batter.
3. Heat a large skillet over medium heat until the butter and oil melt and shimmer.
4. Fry the chicken pieces two at a time, turning them occasionally to ensure even browning.
5. Remove the fried chicken when it is golden brown, using tongs or a spatula to avoid splatter.
6. Serve the chicken hot with tomato sauce on the side, peas, and mashed potatoes.
Each serving contains about: 789 calories; 952 milligrams sodium; 217 milligrams cholesterol; 57 grams fat; 28 grams carbohydrates; 42 grams protein; 1.46 grams fiber.
